text: For whatever things were written before were written for our learning, that through perseverance and through encouragement of the Scriptures we might have hope.
Being confident of this very thing, that he who began a good work in you will complete it until the day of Jesus Christ.
Let’s hold fast the confession of our hope without wavering; for he who promised is faithful.
Peace I leave with you. My peace I give to you; not as the world gives, give I to you. Don’t let your heart be troubled, neither let it be fearful.
Blessed is the man who trusts in Yahweh, and whose confidence is in Yahweh.
But as for me, I will look to Yahweh. I will wait for the God of my salvation. My God will hear me.
My soul, wait in silence for God alone, for my expectation is from him.
Having the eyes of your hearts enlightened, that you may know what is the hope of his calling.
Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who according to his great mercy became our Father again to a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead.
When you pass through the waters, I will be with you; and through the rivers, they will not overflow you.
In hope of eternal life, which God, who can’t lie, promised before time began.
Christ in you, the hope of glory.
Come to me, all you who labor and are heavily burdened, and I will give you rest.
Yahweh, your God, is among you, a mighty one who will save.
Yahweh is good to those who wait for him, to the soul who seeks him.
Hope doesn’t disappoint us, because God’s love has been poured into our hearts through the Holy Spirit.
My God will supply every need of yours according to his riches in glory in Christ Jesus.
This hope we have as an anchor of the soul, a hope both sure and steadfast.
That they should seek the Lord, if perhaps they might reach out for him and find him.
I will restore to you the years that the swarming locust has eaten.
Yahweh, the Lord, is my strength. He makes my feet like deer’s feet, and enables me to go in high places.
Yahweh appeared of old to me, saying, “Yes, I have loved you with an everlasting love. Therefore I have drawn you with loving kindness.”
I have told you these things, that in me you may have peace. In the world you have trouble; but cheer up! I have overcome the world.
For however many are the promises of God, in him is the “Yes.” Therefore also through him is the “Amen”, to the glory of God through us.
He who calls you is faithful, who will also do it.
You will keep whoever’s mind is steadfast in perfect peace, because he trusts in you.
Yahweh is good, a stronghold in the day of trouble; and he knows those who take refuge in him.
I wait for Yahweh. My soul waits. I hope in his word.
Looking at them, Jesus said, “With men this is impossible, but with God all things are possible.”
Now to him who is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that works in us.
Blessed is the man who endures temptation, for when he has been approved, he will receive the crown of life, which the Lord promised to those who love him.
Therefore turn to your God. Keep kindness and justice, and wait continually for your God.
Turn to the stronghold, you prisoners of hope! Even today I declare that I will restore double to you.
Yahweh himself is who goes before you. He will be with you. He will not fail you nor forsake you. Don’t be afraid. Don’t be discouraged.
For we were saved in hope, but hope that is seen is not hope. For who hopes for that which he sees?
Be free from the love of money, content with such things as you have, for he has said, “I will in no way leave you, neither will I in any way forsake you.”
All those whom the Father gives me will come to me. He who comes to me I will in no way throw out.
He who sits on the throne said, “Behold, I am making all things new.” He said, “Write, for these words of God are faithful and true.”
Don’t rejoice against me, my enemy. When I fall, I will arise. When I sit in darkness, Yahweh will be a light to me.
Even to old age I am he, and even to gray hairs I will carry you. I have made, and I will bear. Yes, I will carry, and will deliver.
For you are my hope, Lord Yahweh; my confidence from my youth.
Behold, I am Yahweh, the God of all flesh. Is there anything too hard for me?
Casting all your worries on him, because he cares for you.

In nothing be anxious, but in everything, by prayer and petition with thanksgiving, let your requests be made known to God. And the peace of God, which surpasses all understanding, will guard your hearts and your thoughts in Christ Jesus.
For I am with you, and no one will attack you to harm you, for I have many people in this city.
We know that all things work together for good for those who love God, to those who are called according to his purpose.
Now faith is assurance of things hoped for, proof of things not seen.
The thief only comes to steal, kill, and destroy. I came that they may have life, and may have it abundantly.
Therefore we don’t faint, but though our outward person is decaying, yet our inward person is renewed day by day.
For I, Yahweh your God, will hold your right hand, saying to you, 'Don’t be afraid. I will help you.'
Not by might, nor by power, but by my Spirit, says Yahweh of Armies.
God is our refuge and strength, a very present help in trouble.
Call to me, and I will answer you, and will show you great and difficult things, which you don’t know.
Let us acknowledge Yahweh. Let us press on to know Yahweh. As surely as the sun rises, Yahweh will appear.
For our citizenship is in heaven, from where we also wait for a Savior, the Lord Jesus Christ.
Set your mind on the things that are above, not on the things that are on the earth.
God is faithful, through whom you were called into the fellowship of his Son, Jesus Christ our Lord.
He will wipe away every tear from their eyes. Death will be no more; neither will there be mourning, nor crying, nor pain anymore.
Who is a God like you, who pardons iniquity and passes over the disobedience of the remnant of his heritage?
Behold, God is my salvation. I will trust, and will not be afraid; for Yah, Yahweh, is my strength and song; and he has become my salvation.
For the vision is yet for the appointed time, and it hurries toward the end, and won’t prove false. Though it takes time, wait for it, because it will surely come. It won’t delay.
For we are his workmanship, created in Christ Jesus for good works, which God prepared before that we would walk in them.

For I am persuaded that neither death, nor life, nor angels, nor principalities, nor things present, nor things to come, nor powers, nor height, nor depth, nor any other created thing, will be able to separate us from God’s love, which is in Christ Jesus our Lord.
Looking to Jesus, the author and perfecter of faith, who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross, despising shame, and has sat down at the right hand of the throne of God.
But seek first God’s Kingdom and his righteousness; and all these things will be given to you as well.
My flesh and my heart fails, but God is the strength of my heart and my portion forever.
Tear your heart, and not your garments, and turn to Yahweh your God; for he is gracious and merciful, slow to anger, and abundant in loving kindness.
Know therefore that Yahweh your God himself is God, the faithful God, who keeps covenant and loving kindness with those who love him and keep his commandments to a thousand generations.
Nothing failed of any good thing which Yahweh had spoken to the house of Israel. All came to pass.
Jesus said to her, 'I am the resurrection and the life. He who believes in me will still live, even if he dies.'
Not by works of righteousness, which we did ourselves, but according to his mercy, he saved us.
You shall seek me, and find me, when you search for me with all your heart.
Yahweh will guide you continually, and satisfy your soul in dry places, and make your bones strong.
At that time I will bring you in, and at that time I will gather you; for I will give you honor and praise among all the peoples of the earth.
Let us therefore draw near with boldness to the throne of grace, that we may receive mercy and may find grace for help in time of need.
Rejoicing in hope, enduring in troubles, continuing steadfastly in prayer.
And the Lord will deliver me from every evil work and will preserve me for his heavenly Kingdom. To him be the glory forever and ever. Amen.
I will lift up my eyes to the hills. Where does my help come from? My help comes from Yahweh, who made heaven and earth.
You came near in the day that I called on you. You said, 'Don’t be afraid.'
Behold, on the mountains the feet of him who brings good news, who publishes peace!
For I, Yahweh, don’t change; therefore you, sons of Jacob, are not consumed.
From his fullness we all received grace upon grace.
He who sits on the throne said, 'Behold, I am making all things new.'
This is the boldness which we have toward him, that if we ask anything according to his will, he listens to us.
For it is God who works in you both to will and to work for his good pleasure.
If you then, being evil, know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your Father who is in heaven give good things to those who ask him!
Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever.
For of him, and through him, and to him are all things. To him be the glory forever! Amen.
But as many as received him, to them he gave the right to become God’s children, to those who believe in his name.
As therefore you received Christ Jesus the Lord, walk in him, rooted and built up in him, and established in the faith.
For my thoughts are not your thoughts, and your ways are not my ways, says Yahweh.
He changes the times and the seasons. He removes kings and sets up kings. He gives wisdom to the wise and knowledge to those who have understanding.
Yahweh is near to all those who call on him, to all who call on him in truth.
I will also give you a new heart, and I will put a new spirit within you.
Finally, be strong in the Lord and in the strength of his might.
For we walk by faith, not by sight.
Always rejoice. Pray without ceasing. In everything give thanks, for this is the will of God in Christ Jesus toward you.
But Christ is faithful as a Son over his house. We are his house, if we hold fast our confidence and the rejoicing of our hope firmly to the end.
There is salvation in no one else, for there is no other name under heaven given among men by which we must be saved.
Don’t be afraid. Let your hands be strong.
I will heal their waywardness. I will love them freely.
For I have satiated the weary soul, and I have replenished every sorrowful soul.
For to me to live is Christ, and to die is gain.
I am the vine. You are the branches. He who remains in me, and I in him, bears much fruit, for apart from me you can do nothing.
For the wages of sin is death, but the free gift of God is eternal life in Christ Jesus our Lord.
But you are a chosen race, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people for God’s own possession.
Oh taste and see that Yahweh is good. Blessed is the man who takes refuge in him.
Trust in Yahweh with all your heart, and don’t lean on your own understanding. In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make your paths straight.
Yahweh, you will ordain peace for us, for you have also done all our work for us.
Yet I will rejoice in Yahweh. I will be joyful in the God of my salvation.
In him we have our redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of our trespasses, according to the riches of his grace.
For the grace of God has appeared, bringing salvation to all men.
Therefore he is also able to save to the uttermost those who draw near to God through him.
For I know him whom I have believed, and I am persuaded that he is able to guard that which I have committed to him against that day.
Behold, I am with you always, even to the end of the age. Amen.
It will happen that whoever will call on Yahweh’s name shall be saved.
Seek Yahweh, all you humble of the land, who have kept his ordinances. Seek righteousness. Seek humility.
I will give them a heart to know me, that I am Yahweh. They will be my people, and I will be their God.
I am still confident of this: I will see the goodness of Yahweh in the land of the living.
I am the light of the world. He who follows me will not walk in the darkness, but will have the light of life.
Who delivered us out of the power of darkness, and translated us into the Kingdom of the Son of his love; in whom we have our redemption through his blood, the forgiveness of our sins.
For if we live, we live to the Lord. Or if we die, we die to the Lord. Therefore whether we live or die, we are the Lord’s.
God is faithful, who will not allow you to be tempted above what you are able, but with the temptation will also make the way of escape.
Have this in your mind, which was also in Christ Jesus.
I will greatly rejoice in Yahweh. My soul shall be joyful in my God; for he has clothed me with the garments of salvation.
He has shown you, O man, what is good. What does Yahweh require of you, but to act justly, to love mercy, and to walk humbly with your God?
The eternal God is your dwelling place. Underneath are the everlasting arms.
So Christ also, having been offered once to bear the sins of many, will appear a second time.
Behold, I stand at the door and knock. If anyone hears my voice and opens the door, then I will come in to him.
This is eternal life, that they should know you, the only true God, and him whom you sent, Jesus Christ.
By him everyone who believes is justified from all things, from which you could not be justified by the law of Moses.
For you were once darkness, but are now light in the Lord. Walk as children of light.
Yahweh is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer; my God, my rock, in whom I take refuge.
I have blotted out, as a thick cloud, your transgressions, and, as a cloud, your sins. Return to me, for I have redeemed you.
Ah Lord Yahweh! Behold, you have made the heavens and the earth by your great power and by your outstretched arm. There is nothing too hard for you.
But to you who fear my name shall the sun of righteousness arise with healing in its wings.
But put on the Lord Jesus Christ, and make no provision for the flesh, for its lusts.
And above all things be earnest in your love among yourselves, for love covers a multitude of sins.
I can do all things through Christ, who strengthens me.
For in that he himself has suffered being tempted, he is able to help those who are tempted.
Sow to yourselves in righteousness. Reap according to kindness. Break up your fallow ground.
Seek good, and not evil, that you may live; and so Yahweh, the God of Armies, will be with you.
You will show me the path of life. In your presence is fullness of joy. In your right hand there are pleasures forever more.
For God didn’t send his Son into the world to judge the world, but that the world should be saved through him.
Be kind to one another, tender hearted, forgiving each other, just as God also in Christ forgave you.
That, being justified by his grace, we might be made heirs according to the hope of eternal life.
God is able to make all grace abound to you, that you, always having all sufficiency in everything, may abound to every good work.
For the mountains may depart, and the hills be removed; but my loving kindness will not depart from you.
Yahweh is slow to anger, and great in power, and will by no means leave the guilty unpunished.
He has made everything beautiful in its time.
To the Lord our God belong mercies and forgiveness, for we have rebelled against him.
Therefore don’t throw away your boldness, which has a great reward. For you need endurance.
Therefore receive one another, even as Christ also received you, to the glory of God.
Blessed are those who have not seen, and have believed.
By this God’s love was revealed in us, that God has sent his one and only Son into the world that we might live through him.
For as the heavens are high above the earth, so great is his loving kindness toward those who fear him. As far as the east is from the west, so far has he removed our transgressions from us.
Yahweh’s ransomed ones will return, and come with singing to Zion; and everlasting joy will be on their heads. They will obtain gladness and joy, and sorrow and sighing will flee away.
I will strengthen them in Yahweh. They will walk up and down in his name, says Yahweh.

Finally, brothers, whatever things are true, whatever things are honorable, whatever things are just, whatever things are pure, whatever things are lovely, and whatever things are of good report, if there is any virtue and if there is any praise, think about these things.
And let the peace of God rule in your hearts, to which also you were called in one body, and be thankful.
But the Lord is faithful, who will establish you and guard you from the evil one.

But these things don’t count; nor do I hold my life dear to myself, so that I may finish my race with joy, and the ministry which I received from the Lord Jesus, to fully testify to the Good News of the grace of God.

Yahweh says, Don’t let the wise man glory in his wisdom. Don’t let the mighty man glory in his might. Don’t let the rich man glory in his riches. But let him who glories glory in this, that he has understanding, and knows me.
But you, Lord, are a merciful and gracious God, slow to anger, and abundant in loving kindness and truth.
A man’s heart plans his course, but Yahweh directs his steps.
That by two immutable things, in which it is impossible for God to lie, we may have a strong encouragement, who have fled for refuge to take hold of the hope set before us.
Being therefore justified by faith, we have peace with God through our Lord Jesus Christ.
Jesus said to him, “I am the way, the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father, except through me.”
Therefore let them also who suffer according to the will of God in doing good entrust their souls to him, as to a faithful Creator.
Yahweh, you are my God. I will exalt you! I will praise your name, for you have done wonderful things, things planned long ago, in complete faithfulness and truth.
You will have plenty to eat, and be satisfied, and will praise Yahweh your God’s name, who has dealt wondrously with you.
But the salvation of the righteous is from Yahweh. He is their stronghold in the time of trouble. Yahweh helps them and rescues them.
In him you also, having heard the word of the truth, the Good News of your salvation, in whom, having also believed, you were sealed with the Holy Spirit of promise.

Now to him who is able to keep them from stumbling, and to present you faultless before the presence of his glory in great joy, to God our Savior, who alone is wise, be glory and majesty, dominion and power, both now and forever. Amen.
The Spirit and the bride say, “Come!” He who hears, let him say, “Come!” He who is thirsty, let him come. He who desires, let him take the water of life freely.
For to us a child is born, to us a son is given; and the government will be on his shoulders. His name will be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace.
But you, Bethlehem Ephrathah, being small among the clans of Judah, out of you one will come out to me that is to be ruler in Israel.
For everything spoken by God is possible.
Behold, the virgin shall be with child, and shall bring forth a son. They shall call his name Immanuel; which is, being interpreted, 'God with us.'
The Word became flesh, and lived among us. We saw his glory, such glory as of the one and only Son of the Father, full of grace and truth.

The angel said to them, 'Don’t be afraid, for behold, I bring you good news of great joy which will be to all the people. For there is born to you today, in David’s city, a Savior, who is Christ the Lord.'
Therefore the Lord himself will give you a sign. Behold, the virgin will conceive, and bear a son, and shall call his name Immanuel.
When they saw the star, they rejoiced with exceedingly great joy.
Because of the tender mercy of our God, whereby the dawn from on high will visit us, to shine on those who sit in darkness and the shadow of death.
For God so loved the world, that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him should not perish, but have eternal life.
Yahweh’s glory shall be revealed, and all flesh shall see it together; for the mouth of Yahweh has spoken it.
But when the fullness of the time came, God sent out his Son, born to a woman, born under the law, that he might redeem those who were under the law.
Looking for the blessed hope and appearing of the glory of our great God and Savior, Jesus Christ.
God, having in the past spoken to the fathers through the prophets at many times and in various ways, has at the end of these days spoken to us by his Son.
He is the image of the invisible God, the firstborn of all creation.
Being found in human form, he humbled himself, becoming obedient to death, yes, the death of the cross. Therefore God also highly exalted him.
For you know the grace of our Lord Jesus Christ, that though he was rich, yet for your sakes he became poor.
He has on his garment and on his thigh a name written, 'KING OF KINGS, AND LORD OF LORDS.'
Make a joyful noise to Yahweh, all the earth! Burst out and sing for joy, yes, sing praises!
Rejoice greatly, daughter of Zion! Shout, daughter of Jerusalem! Behold, your King comes to you.
A shoot will come out of the stock of Jesse, and a branch out of his roots will bear fruit.
Glory to God in the highest, on earth peace, good will toward men.
In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God.
For by him all things were created, in the heavens and on the earth, things visible and things invisible.
His Son is the radiance of his glory, the very image of his substance, and upholding all things by the word of his power.
For by grace you have been saved through faith, and that not of yourselves; it is the gift of God, not of works.
It is because of Yahweh’s loving kindnesses that we are not consumed, because his compassion doesn’t fail. They are new every morning; great is your faithfulness.
Behold, I will do a new thing. It springs out now. Don’t you know it? I will even make a way in the wilderness, and rivers in the desert.
Haven’t I commanded you? Be strong and courageous. Don’t be afraid. Don’t be discouraged; for Yahweh your God is with you wherever you go.
Forgetting the things which are behind, and stretching forward to the things which are before, I press on toward the goal.
Some trust in chariots, and some in horses, but we trust the name of Yahweh our God.
Now to him who is able to do exceedingly abundantly above all that we ask or think, according to the power that works in us.
What then shall we say about these things? If God is for us, who can be against us?
I have spoken these things to you, that my joy may remain in you, and that your joy may be made full.
But those who wait for Yahweh will renew their strength. They will mount up with wings like eagles.
